concerns.text: The 'PCS (CSV)' dataset cited (https://huggingface.co/datasets/Patsagorn/pcshsbr-music-request/resolve/main/song-request_may23-mar24_cleaned.csv) is demonstrably the WRONG dataset. It contains song request data, not Post-Concussion Symptom Scale scores. This is a critical mismatch for the planned analysis.

The 'NIfTI (Gzip)' dataset cited (https://huggingface.co/datasets/farrell236/NSCLC-Radiomics-NIFTI/resolve/main/NSCLC-Radiomics-NIFTI/LUNG1-001/image.nii.gz) is also the WRONG dataset. It contains lung cancer images, not mTBI fMRI data. This is inappropriate for the research question.

The plan acknowledges the mismatch with the PCS dataset but does not propose a viable alternative. The contingency plan relies on the *hope* that the OpenNeuro dataset contains the necessary clinical data, which is a significant risk. A verified alternative source for mTBI cognitive scores MUST be identified.
